tasks.title: ControlServer foundation
tasks.summary: Implement the Named Pipe control server foundation.
acceptance: manual: verify same-user ACL and message-mode transport
tc-pipe-server-open: Named Pipe server opens with PIPE_TYPE_MESSAGE | PIPE_READMODE_MESSAGE
tc-pipe-acl-same-user: connection from same user succeeds; connection from different SID is rejected
tc-pipe-message-mode: send 1 complete JSON message → receiver gets exactly 1 complete message (no partial reads)

tasks.title: Split layout controller + XAML projection
tasks.summary: Implement the BonsplitController and project snapshots into XAML.
acceptance: manual: verify split/close/move keep layout_version consistent
tc-split-h-produces-2-panes: horizontal split on root pane → snapshot.panes.size() == 2
tc-layout-version-increments: SplitPane / ClosePane / MovePane 각각 호출 후 layout_version 증가
tc-close-removes-pane: ClosePane(id) → snapshot에 해당 pane_id 없음
tc-focus-pane-tracked: FocusPane(id) → GetActivePaneId() == id

tasks.title: Sidebar/workspace state projection
tasks.summary: Implement TabManager-backed sidebar projection and metadata batching.
acceptance: manual: verify active workspace source of truth remains in TabManager
tc-create-workspace: CreateWorkspace() → ListWorkspaces().size() 정확히 1 증가
tc-active-workspace-source-of-truth: ActivateWorkspace(id) → GetActiveWorkspaceId() == id (ListView.SelectedItem은 결과만 반영)
tc-metadata-batch-window: 100ms 내 연속 ApplyWorkspaceMetadata 호출 → sidebar update 횟수 ≤ 1

tasks.title: Tab/workspace lifecycle rules
tasks.summary: Implement lifecycle and selection rules for workspaces and tabs.
acceptance: manual: verify close selection follows the documented left-priority rule
tc-close-select-left-priority: 왼쪽 형제가 있는 workspace 닫기 → 왼쪽 형제가 active
tc-close-last-workspace-empty: 마지막 workspace 닫기 → 빈 상태, 크래시 없음
tc-lifecycle-state-sequence: workspace 생성 → created → attached → focused → blurred → hidden → detached → disposed 7개 상태 전이 모두 도달 가능
tc-close-busy-confirm: 실행 중인 프로세스가 있는 workspace CloseWorkspace() → needsConfirmClose=true 반환

tasks.title: IPC TDD for split/focus/state conflict
tasks.summary: Add tests for IPC error handling and state conflicts around split/focus operations.
acceptance: manual: verify error codes and payload limits match _workspace/08-ipc-cli.md contract
tc-pipe-connect: client connects to Named Pipe → server returns session_id (UUID format)
tc-cmd-new-tab: new_tab command sent via IPC → TabManager adds exactly 1 workspace
tc-cmd-send-input: send_input command → ConPTY stdin receives the exact byte payload
tc-cmd-close-pane: close_pane with valid pane_id → pane removed, focus moved to nearest sibling
tc-error-unknown-cmd: unknown command name → error response with code UNKNOWN_COMMAND
tc-error-invalid-id: valid command with non-existent pane_id → error response with code NOT_FOUND
tc-split-conflict: simultaneous split and close on same pane → one succeeds, other returns CONFLICT or NOT_FOUND
tc-focus-while-closing: focus command on pane that is being disposed → error response, no crash
